title: Phaeopappus drabifolius
taxonomy: Phaeopappus drabifolius is classified within the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Phaeopappus. The species Phaeopappus drabifolius is native to the southwestern United States. Further classification details include its placement within the tribe Heliantheae. Phaeopappus drabifolius is a shrub-like plant native to the desert regions.
